zh.Bures, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可布勒斯
zh.Empingham, Rutland, England: 英國英格蘭盧特藍德艾平加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerold De Normanville於大約1142年出生在英國盧特藍德艾平加姆時，他的父親Ralph de Normanville28歲，母親Emma De Rutland23歲。他於大約1165年與Maud Bures在英國英格蘭盧特藍德艾平加姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1177年在英國英格蘭盧特藍德艾平加姆享年36歲。

zh-hans.Bures, Essex, England: 英国英格兰艾可布勒斯
zh-hans.Empingham, Rutland, England: 英国英格兰盧特藍德艾平加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gerold De Normanville于大约1142年出生在英国盧特藍德艾平加姆时，他的父亲Ralph de Normanville28岁，母亲Emma De Rutland23岁。他于大约1165年与Maud Bures在英国英格兰盧特藍德艾平加姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1177年在英国英格兰盧特藍德艾平加姆享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gerold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + wald ‘rule’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. There has been some confusion with Gerard . It died out in England at the end of the 13th century. However, it continued to be popular in Ireland, where it had been brought in the 12th century at the time of Strongbow's invasion. It was used in England in the 17th century and revived in the 19th century, along with several other long-extinct names of Norman, Old English, and Celtic origin, and is now more common than Gerard, which survived all along as an English ‘gentry’ name.

variants.name: Jerrold
meanings: Rare variant of   Gerald  , probably a transferred use of the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerold De Normanville was born about 1142, in Empingham, Rutland, England, his father, Ralph de Normanville, was 28 and his mother, Emma De Rutland, was 23. He married Maud Bures about 1165, in Empingham, Rutland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1177, in Empingham, Rutland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerold De Normanville est né environ 1142, à Empingham, Rutland, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Normanville, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Emma De Rutland, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Maud Bures environ 1165, à Empingham, Rutland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1177, à Empingham, Rutland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gerold De Normanville um 1142 in Empingham, Rutland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Normanville 28 und seine Mutter Emma De Rutland 23. Er hat um 1165 in Empingham, Rutland, England, United Kingdom Maud Bures geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1177 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Empingham, Rutland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gerold De Normanville è nato il circa 1142 nel Empingham, Rutland, England, il suo padre, Ralph de Normanville, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Emma De Rutland, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Maud Bures circa 1165, nel Empingham, Rutland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1177, nel Empingham, Rutland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerold De Normanvilleが約1142年にイギリスルトランドエンパンガムで生まれた時，父Ralph de Normanvilleは28歳，母Emma De Rutlandは23歳であった。約1165年にイギリスイギリスルトランドエンパンガムでMaud Buresと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1177年にイギリスイギリスルトランドエンパンガムで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerold De Normanville(이)가 대략 1142년 영국 루틀랜드 핀그함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Normanville(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma De Rutland(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1165년 영국 잉글랜드 루틀랜드 핀그함에서 Maud Bures(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1177년 영국 잉글랜드 루틀랜드 핀그함에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerold De Normanville nasceu aproximadamente 1142, em Empingham, Rutland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de Normanville, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Emma De Rutland, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Bures aproximadamente 1165, em Empingham, Rutland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1177, em Empingham, Rutland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerold De Normanville родился около 1142 г. в местности эмпингхам, рутланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph de Normanville было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma De Rutland, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Bures около 1165 г. в местности эмпингхам, рутланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1177 г. в местности эмпингхам, рутланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gerold De Normanville nació aproximadamente 1142, en Empingham, Rutland, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph de Normanville, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Emma De Rutland, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Maud Bures aproximadamente 1165, en Empingham, Rutland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1177, en Empingham, Rutland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 36 años.
